    Home PageEmergency PreparednessPreparing in Routine, Ready in EmergencyContact During An Emergency

    Who to Contact During an Emergency

    During emergencies and in distress, it is important to contact the relevant emergency organizations as soon as possible. The following are important phone numbers you need to contact when needed

    When preparing your home and the supplies needed for emergencies, it is very important to draw up a list with the phone numbers of emergency organizations, family members, and neighbors.

    We should not rely on real-time web search or cell phone contact list. It is important to prepare a list of essential phone numbers, hang the list in an accessible place and make sure all household members know them and know who to contact during an emergency

    Emergency Call Centers

    • 100 - Israel Police: reporting unexploded missiles/rockets and events related to internal security such as, disorderly conduct and terror events.
    • 101 - Magen David Adom: report injuries and receive first aid.
    • 102 - Israel Fire and Rescue Services: report fires and people who are trapped.
    • 103 - Electric Corporation: information about power outages.
    • 104 - Home Front Command: information, guidelines and alerts during emergencies.
    • 105 - Operation “Iron Swords” - missing persons hotline.
    • 106 / 107 / 108 / 109 - The local municipality: information and assistance on the local level.
    • 110 - The Israel Police information center: information on blocked roads and additional information concerning the Israel Police.

    • Additional relevant organizations in your area of residence.
    • Family members, neighbors, relatives, and other acquaintances that can assist you during emergencies.


    Help and support centers

    • The information and assistance center of the Ministry of Labor, Welfare and Social Services - 118.
    • ERAN - providing emotional first aid - 1201.
    • NATAL - emotional assistance to trauma victims in the context of acts of terrorism and war - 1-800-363-363.
    • NAAN (Youth Listens to Youth) - support for youth in distress- 03-6919765.
    • Call Center for Senior Citizens of the Ministry of Social Equality - *8840.
    • Counseling for elderly persons and their families at the National Insurance Institute - *9696.
    • Ministry of Immigration and Absorption assistance and support, 8:00-24:00 - Russian - 04-7702648 Spanish - 04-7702649 French - 04-7702650 Amharic - 04-8258081 English - 04-7702651.
    • Population and Immigration Authority Call Center for Assistance to Foreign Workers - 1-700-707-889.


    The importance of knowing and preparing a list of phone numbers for emergencies

    Past experience teaches us that during emergency and stressful situations, it is important to involve the relevant emergency organizations, the local municipality and others that can assist you such as family and friends as soon as possible. There are a number of reasons for this:

    • Time is a critical factor in emergencies - in times of emergency and distress, it is important to contact the relevant people and entities as early as possible. Their rapid arrival can provide a life-saving response. For example, firefighting and rescue forces’ swift arrival will enable rescuing trapped persons and extinguishing fires more quickly. Swift medical responders, will enable providing first aid more quickly, which can save lives.

    • Remote assistance -emergency responders can provide critical guidance remotely, for example, instructions on assisting injured people until the ambulance and paramedics arrive. Nonetheless, it’s best to be prepared to cope independently with possible scenarios.

    • Emergency events develop in unforeseen ways – during emergencies, rapidly deteriorating situation may rule out the possibility of contacting the emergency responders in a short time. Therefore, it is important to prepare a list of phone numbers of family members, acquaintances and neighbors, that may assist during an emergency situation.

    Q&A

    What is the right equipment to prepare for an emergency?

    It is important to prepare in advance the necessary equipment that will assist us and our household members during an emergency, and to store it inside a bag that we can take with us when needed.
    For the emergency equipment list, click here.

    What emergencies require to prepare equipment ahead of time?

    In emergency situations that require the population to remain in lockdown for an extended period of time, in situations where it is necessary to evacuate the house, and in situations in whichf damage to infrastructure may damage the fabric of life. A mass casualty incident also requires preparing equipment in advance because a large number of cases will force the rescue forces to set priorities for handling cases and will extend the time of arrival to each home and each patient.

    What are the phone numbers of call centers that provide emotional support and help during emergencies?

    For a list of phone number for call centers that provide emotional support and help.

    Why is it important to prepare emergency phone numbers in advance?

    Past experience shows that in emergency and distress situations, it is important to involve the emergency entities, the local municipality and other factors such as family members, acquaintances and neighbors, who can help as soon as possible. This is due to the following reasons:

    • Time in an emergency event is critical - in emergency and distress situations, it is important to involve relevant people and entities as soon as possible. A quick arrival of the emergency forces will help in a life-saving response. For example, a quick arrival of the fire and rescue forces will allow to rescue trapped people and put out the fire faster, and a quick arrival of medical forces will make it possible to provide first aid quickly, which can save lives.
    • Remote assistance - the emergency factors can provide essential guidance from a distance, for example in providing assistance to the injured until the arrival of the ambulance and paramedics. However, it is always better to be prepared to deal independently with possible scenarios.
    • The development of emergency events is unknown - during an emergency, there may be situations in which we will not be able to contact the emergency and rescue forces within a short time. That is why it is important to prepare in advance a phone list of family members, acquaintances and neighbors who can help in an emergency.

    Why should water be prepared in emergency equipment?

    There are emergency situations in which the regular water supply may be affected, so it is important to prepare water in the amount of three liters per person per day, for three days.
